root.sql: select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no) as count_mem , sum(decode(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex,'M','1','0')) as sum_male , sum(decode(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.sex,'F','1','0')) as sum_female FROM sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type , sc_cls_confirm_data WHERE ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) AND ( ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0' ) ) AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no= sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type AND sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date AND sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no AND sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'SHR' AND sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance > 0 --AND sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date = '31/07/2023' /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ORDER BY sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
